2026-03-25JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Supreme Court of British ColumbiaAppointment of Brook J. Greenberg of the City of North Vancouver, in the Province of British Columbia, one of His Majesty's Counsel learned in the law, to be a Judge of the Supreme Court of British Columbia.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Supreme Court of British Columbia
precis: Appointment of Brook J. Greenberg of the City of North Vancouver, in the Province of British Columbia, one of His Majesty's Counsel learned in the law, to be a Judge of the Supreme Court of British Columbia.
